languages.text: "Я знаю. Духи принесли его последний вздох на своих крыльях. Техножрец славно послужил Истине Изначальной и пал, защищая главное сокровище планеты — ключ к ее вознесению".

traits.locale_text: "Я знаю. Духи принесли его последний вздох на своих крыльях. Техножрец славно послужил Истине Изначальной и пал, защищая главное сокровище планеты — ключ к ее вознесению".
"Я знаю. Духи принесли его последний вздох на своих крыльях. Техножрец славно послужил Истине Изначальной и пал, защищая главное сокровище планеты — ключ к ее вознесению".

languages.text: "I am aware. The spirits carried his final breath on their wings. The Tech-Priest served the Primordial Truth well and perished defending the planet's most precious treasure — the key to its ascension."
languages.original_text: "Я знаю. Духи принесли его последний вздох на своих крыльях. Техножрец славно послужил Истине Изначальной и пал, защищая главное сокровище планеты — ключ к ее вознесению".

traits.locale_text: "I am aware. The spirits carried his final breath of their wings. The Tech-Priest served the Primordial Truth well and perished defending the planet's most precious treasure — the key to its ascension."

"I am aware. The spirits carried his final breath of their wings. The Tech-Priest served the Primordial Truth well and perished defending the planet's most precious treasure — the key to its ascension."

"I am aware. The spirits carried his final breath on their wings. The Tech-Priest served the Primordial Truth well and perished defending the planet's most precious treasure — the key to its ascension."

"I am aware. The spirits carried his final breath on their wings. The Tech-Priest served the Primordial Truth well and perished defending the planet's most precious treasure — the key to its ascension."

"I am aware. The spirits carried his final breath on their wings. The Tech-Priest served the Primordial Truth well and perished defending the planet's most precious treasure — the key to its ascension."

languages.text: "Ich bin mir dessen bewusst. Die Geister trugen seinen letzten Atemzug auf ihren Schwingen. Der Tech-Priester hat der Urwahrheit gut gedient und ist bei der Verteidigung des wertvollsten Schatzes des Planeten — dem Schlüssel zu seinem Aufstieg — gestorben."
languages.original_text: "I am aware. The spirits carried his final breath on their wings. The Tech-Priest served the Primordial Truth well and perished defending the planet's most precious treasure — the key to its ascension."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin mir dessen bewusst. Die Geister trugen seinen letzten Atemzug auf ihren Schwingen. Der Tech-Priester hat der Urwahrheit gut gedient und ist bei der Verteidigung des wertvollsten Schatzes des Planeten — dem Schlüssel zu seinem Aufstieg — gestorben."

languages.text: "Je suis au courant. Les esprits ont porté son dernier souffle sur leurs ailes. Le prêtre-technicien a bien servi la vérité primordiale et a péri en défendant le trésor le plus précieux de la planète, la clé de son ascension."
languages.original_text: "I am aware. The spirits carried his final breath on their wings. The Tech-Priest served the Primordial Truth well and perished defending the planet's most precious treasure — the key to its ascension."

traits.locale_text: "Je suis au courant. Les esprits ont porté son dernier souffle sur leurs ailes. Le prêtre-technicien a bien servi la vérité primordiale et a péri en défendant le trésor le plus précieux de la planète, la clé de son ascension."

languages.text: "Soy consciente. Los espíritus llevaron su último aliento en sus alas. El Tecnosacerdote sirvió bien a la Verdad Primordial y pereció defendiendo el tesoro más preciado del planeta: la clave de su ascensión".
languages.original_text: "I am aware. The spirits carried his final breath on their wings. The Tech-Priest served the Primordial Truth well and perished defending the planet's most precious treasure — the key to its ascension."

traits.locale_text: "Soy consciente. Los espíritus llevaron su último aliento en sus alas. El Tecnosacerdote sirvió bien a la Verdad Primordial y pereció defendiendo el tesoro más preciado del planeta: la clave de su ascensión".

languages.text: "Farkındayım. Ruhlar onun son nefesini kanatlarında taşıdılar. Teknisyen Rahip Ezeli Hakikate iyi hizmet etti ve gezegenin en değerli hazinesini — yükselişinin anahtarını — savunurken can verdi."
languages.original_text: "I am aware. The spirits carried his final breath on their wings. The Tech-Priest served the Primordial Truth well and perished defending the planet's most precious treasure — the key to its ascension."

traits.locale_text: "Farkındayım. Ruhlar onun son nefesini kanatlarında taşıdılar. Teknisyen Rahip Ezeli Hakikate iyi hizmet etti ve gezegenin en değerli hazinesini — yükselişinin anahtarını — savunurken can verdi."
